items.title: "Our newsletter went viral"
items.desc: Marketing sends an email with one tracked link. 10 000 req/s for 90 seconds. The redirect path must hold; the analytics pipeline can fall behind and catch up — but no redirect can drop.

items.title: "I want a memorable slug for the all-hands"
items.desc: Someone types a slug into the form ("all-hands-q4"), pastes the Zoom link, copies the resulting short URL, and pastes it into the calendar invite. End-to-end under 30 seconds, no API key.

items.title: "We printed it on a flyer"
items.desc: A short URL was printed on 5 000 flyers six months ago. The slug must still resolve. Expiry never set; data never lost; the link works as long as the box is up.
